narrative.narrative: Fear is gripping the market as the Fear & Greed Index plunges to 25, yet beneath the surface, stablecoin reserves are quietly expanding—a classic divergence that echoes the August 2024 bottom. With MVRV Z-Score signaling deeply undervalued conditions and the regime still flashing RISK_ON, this looks less like a breakdown and more like a shakeout before the next leg.
narrative.headline: Panic at the Bottom: Smart Money Accumulates

next_move.outlook: The narrative arc suggests the current fear-driven compression will resolve upward as sidelined stablecoin capital rotates back in, mirroring the August 2024 recovery pattern.

consensus.key_reasoning: Both brains identify a structural divergence between weak price sentiment (Fear & Greed at 25) and strong under-the-surface accumulation signals (stablecoin growth, MVRV Z-Score), matching the August 2024 bottom at 79.1% similarity. The analyst's higher trust weight (7.67) anchors the phase at Complacency (score 47-54) rather than Panic, with structural ETF flows supporting a LONG bias over blind bearish capitulation.
